name: Sellforte
description: Causal marketing mix modeling platform with incrementality testing and AI agents for media planning and buying.

seo.title: Sellforte — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Sellforte: Causal marketing mix modeling platform with incrementality testing and AI agents for media planning and buying.

when_to_use: Causal MMM for measuring incremental media spend impact
Incrementality testing integrated with marketing mix models

pros: Causal MMM with integrated incrementality tests
AI agents support media planning workflows
cons: Not an MMP or real-time tracker
review.verdict: Rigorous causal MMM with AI assistance for enterprises, but it sits on top of attribution, not in place of it.
review.best_for: European enterprise retailers and brands wanting causal MMM plus AI-assisted planning.
review.not_for: Small brands or mobile-only teams needing light, real-time install attribution.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence

lock_in.reason: Deep MMM integration hard to migrate
